# Emiliano G.O. — Portfolio

> Software engineer building Python backends, CLI tools, and data infrastructure.

## https://emiliano-go.com/

Personal portfolio and project showcase. About, open-source contributions, references, and contact information.

### Key sections

- **Projects** — DBWarden (SQL-first migration toolkit), schemap (Pydantic v2 schema generator), crxml (Rust-accelerated XML parser), vigil (Prefect GitHub activity monitor), mapcreator (React Canvas map editor).
- **Open Source** — Co-maintainer of FastAPI-boilerplate (2k stars). Documentation, developer experience, plugin architecture.
- **References** — Professional references with contact details.

## https://emiliano-go.com/projects

Detailed project pages with code examples, feature grids, and links to GitHub/PyPI.

### Projects

- **DBWarden** — SQL-first migration system for SQLAlchemy. No migration runtime, plain SQL output. Python, 5 DB dialects, rollback, impact analysis, offline mode.
- **schemap** — Automatic Pydantic v2 schemas from SQLAlchemy 2.0 models. @auto_schema decorator, AutoBase inheritance, TimestampMixin, SoftDeleteMixin.
- **crxml** — Fast streaming Crystal Reports XML parser with Rust extension. Lazy pandas, pipeline stages, parallel mode. PyPI package.
- **vigil** — Prefect-based GitHub activity monitor. PyGithub + ClickHouse, cron-scheduled, structured logging.
- **mapcreator** — Tile-based building map editor. React + Canvas, multi-floor, A* pathfinding, JSON export.
- **PyPI utilities** — seoslug, detrack, acrresolv.

## Tech stack

Astro, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript. Deployed as static site.
